chief_data.selection_rationale: Candidate 1 is the only surviving candidate with a combined score of 0.750. It achieved high scores in fluidics and safety, driven by its low Reynolds number and pressure drop, which ensure stable laminar flow and minimal risk of leaks or bursts. The chemistry score was lower due to the moderate conversion rate, which could be improved with further optimization. The user objective of a balanced design favored this candidate as it provides a good compromise across all domains. The most important remaining uncertainty is the reaction kinetics under flow conditions, as the enhancement factor from batch to flow is not yet verified. The first experiment on the bench should verify the reaction conversion and product yield at the specified flow rate and residence time.
remaining_uncertainties: k estimated from batch; flow enhancement factor of 10× is class-typical but not experimentally verified
chief_data.experiment_recommendation: Run blank solvent at design Q for 30 min, then switch to reaction mixture. Sample at t=3τ and t=5τ.

pump_flowrates.derivation: ṅ_lim=0.0333 mmol/min × eq=1.0 / C_feed=0.0667 M = 0.500 mL/min
